title: Hikaru Utada: Laughter in the Dark Tour 2018
original_title: Hikaru Utada Laughter in the Dark Tour 2018
overview: Celebrating twenty years since their debut, Hikaru Utada takes the stage at Makuhari Messe for the final performance of their Laughter in the Dark Tour.
